judge_calls.reasoning: The assistant correctly identified 8 of the 10 required conference papers from the rubric: AAAI TEMPLE (1), ACM MM TimeChat-Online (3), ECCV VITATECS (5), NeurIPS FETV (6), ACL Delving into Openness of CLIP (7), EMNLP CascadeBERT (8), EMNLP Dynamic Knowledge Distillation (9), and EMNLP Text AutoAugment (10). It missed two: CVPR GroundingME (2) and CVPR Video-MME (4) (deliberately excluded). An extra paper (TempCompass) is not in the rubric and does not add weight. Total awarded weight = 8 × 10% = 80% = 0.8.
judge_calls.rubric_preview:
